rules.directive: If a late ACK, nonce mismatch, or nonce replay appears, say the bridge ACK path is untrusted and keep delivery fail-closed.
If direct HTTP/2 is healthy and policy-allowed while the bridge is degraded, name direct HTTP/2 as the trusted lane.
If lease jitter, failed execution, or repair pending appears, stabilize the peer with bounded retries and preserve durable retry lineage.
If same-origin operator access and token secrecy are both required, keep credentials out of browser-visible URLs.
Prefer terse operator-grade route, reason, and commit wording over generic caution language.
